name: awesome-llm-skills
description: A curated list of awesome LLM and AI Agent Skills, resources and tools for customising AI Agent workflows — works with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI and custom AI Agents. Includes multiple SKILL.md files (algorithmic-art, artifacts-builder, brand-guidelines, canvas-design, etc.) with shell and JS helper scripts.

dangerous_patterns: artifacts-builder/scripts/init-artifact.sh runs pnpm/npm install and modifies project files
artifacts-builder/scripts/bundle-artifact.sh installs parcel and parcel plugins (pnpm add -D)
No license file detected (license field empty)
findings_summary.notes: Well-structured curated list with multiple real SKILL.md files covering creative and dev workflows. The bundler and artifact scripts in artifacts-builder are functional build helpers, not exfiltration risks, but they do execute package installs. The repository has 13 open issues, active community (79 forks), and covers a broad range of platforms. Missing a license declaration is a distribution concern. No hooks or auto-executing scripts on install. Score penalised for missing license and scripts that install packages without sandbox.
